text: Jarvis, quick check-in. What's on the calendar today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, April 26. No work meetings today. You have Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center and working on the garage cabinetry.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Yum, that sounds delicious! Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Planning a street block party soon. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Catan is always a good time. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Reading a new book before bed. My starting running back is questionable. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Good way to wrap up the day. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. That's a big step. I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Good planning. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: The kitchen sink area has a problem. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Let's get that resolved. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Soldering custom sensors in the garage. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I've indexed the research notes. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Planning our weekly meals today. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Meal planning saves so much time. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that played golf with Jake Morrison today. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. Social breaks are great. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Setting my fantasy football lineup. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Relaxation mode active. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Ethan's team played a match and won 4-3! It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Great progress. What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Toddlers are full of energy. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: The smart-home hub is acting up today. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Automations are great when they work. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that writing scripts to process image datasets. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. I checked the telemetry feeds. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
